mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT stb_sw_plan_inst_ver ,nvl2(stb_sw_plan_inst_ver,decode(substr(stb_sw_plan_inst_ver,10,4),null,to_number(substr(stb_sw_plan_inst_ver,1,3))||'.'||substr(stb_sw_plan_inst_ver,4,3)||'.'||substr(stb_sw_plan_inst_ver,7,3),to_number(substr(stb_sw_plan_inst_ver,1,3))||'.'||substr(stb_sw_plan_inst_ver,4,3)||'.'||substr(stb_sw_plan_inst_ver,7,3)||'-'||substr(stb_sw_plan_inst_ver,10,4)),' ') stb_sw_plan_inst_ver2 FROM st_upd_plan_sts_base_sum
